caption: A man with glasses and a large, grey, spiked wig sits in a podcast studio. He wears a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He is equipped with black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a white storage shelf containing various items. To his right, a red and white logo reads "BOSS TALK 101" with the word "PODCAST" appearing below it in a smaller white box. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his facial expression and opening his mouth as he speaks. The background, including the photos and the "LEE" branding on a yellow object, remains stationary.
